name: kpi_coverage_ratio
definition: Launch plan tasks with a mapped KPI divided by total measurable tasks in the active playbook.
target_hint: ≥80% before launch week. Unmapped tasks cannot be reviewed post-launch.

name: event_taxonomy_completeness
definition: Funnel steps with named events divided by total funnel steps defined.
target_hint: 100% for signup and activation paths. Partial taxonomy blocks GA4 implementation.

name: manual_log_cadence
definition: Weeks with ≥1 manual KPI update divided by weeks since plan start (when GA4 absent).
target_hint: 100% weekly logging until GA4 connected. Gaps >2 weeks = measurement discipline failure.

name: weekly_review_completion
definition: Weekly reviews completed with documented stop/start/continue decisions.
target_hint: Every week during active launch plan. Missed reviews correlate with failed retries.

name: north_star_trend
definition: North-star metric week-over-week direction during launch month.
target_hint: Define explicit threshold (e.g. +10% WoW signups). Flat 3 weeks triggers bottleneck re-diagnosis.
